title: Skyline Apartments owner promises to finish repairs soon in settlement with Syracuse
summary: Clear Investment Group has settled a lawsuit with the City of Syracuse regarding Skyline Apartments (to be renamed The Metropolitan), committing to complete renovations and make 350+ housing units ready for occupancy over seven months. The settlement includes weekly city inspections, phased certificates of occupancy, and drops the city's receivership action. This resolves a dispute over renovation delays attributed to fire/water damage and represents a critical housing supply recovery.
department_refs: Department of Neighborhood and Business Development

political_signal.description: Mayor Walsh publicly framed settlement as achieving housing recovery goals with accountability mechanisms. Settlement demonstrates executive commitment to remedying legacy housing neglect through legal enforcement and ongoing oversight.
